gigapan.description:
We made it out Monday evening and wanted to be in Gerlach during the day so we could check on some things.  So 
we found a corner and made ourselves comfortable.

"I assume that is a cow femur"  Rose
I replied 'we are in Gerlach, never assume anything"
"It does look human size to me.  Creepy"  she replied.
